title: University Time Table Key Highlights - Kristu Jayanti University

detail.title: University Time Table Key Highlights - Kristu Jayanti University
detail.short_info: Kristu Jayanti University Time Table 2026 has been released for VI Trimester MBA End Trimester Theory Examination April 2026. Check and download the latest KJU MBA exam schedule from kristujayanti.edu.in/examination/end_semester_trimester_examination_time_table.php.

content.text: The Kristu Jayanti University Time Table 2026 for the VI Trimester MBA End Trimester Theory Examination April 2026 has been published on the official examination portal. This Kristu Jayanti University MBA time table provides the complete April 2026 schedule for final‑trimester MBA theory papers, helping students organise revision, project submissions and placement activities.
Candidates can now visit kristujayanti.edu.in and download the VI Trimester MBA End Trimester Theory Examination April 2026 time table from the dedicated end semester/trimester examination page.

sections.heading: University Time Table Key Highlights - Kristu Jayanti University

content.text: Kristu Jayanti University has released the VI Trimester MBA End Trimester Theory Examination April 2026 schedule specifically for MBA students in their final trimester. The time table outlines exam dates, course codes and paper titles, ensuring that management students can clearly see their entire April 2026 assessment window in one official document.

headers: Kristu Jayanti University Time Table 2026 - Key Highlights
rows: End Trimester Theory Examination Time Table (MBA VI Trimester)
As per latest update on university examination portal (March 2026)

sections.heading: Kristu Jayanti University Time Table Link

content.text: The university hosts the VI Trimester MBA End Trimester Theory Examination April 2026 time table on its central end‑semester/trimester examination page, where all active UG/PG exam schedules are listed. Students can use the link below to access the page and then select the specific MBA VI Trimester schedule.

rows: VI Trimester MBA End Trimester Theory Examination April 2026 Time Table

sections.heading: How to Check Kristu Jayanti University MBA Time Table 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to view and download the Kristu Jayanti University VI Trimester MBA End Trimester Theory Examination April 2026 time table:

items: Open the official website https://kristujayanti.edu.in in your browser.

Navigate to the “Examination” section and select End Semester/Trimester Examination Time Table, or directly visit https://kristujayanti.edu.in/examination/end_semester_trimester_examination_time_table.php.
On the time table page, look for the link titled “VI Trimester MBA End Trimester Theory Examination April 2026”.
Click on the link; the official time table PDF/notice will open in a new tab.
Check the exam dates, paper codes, paper titles and session timings carefully for all your MBA courses in VI Trimester.
Download or print the time table so you can plan your revision schedule and avoid clashes with project, viva or internship obligations.
